props.message:
TAKE WHAT YOU NEED.

THERE IS ALWAYS MORE.

THE QUIETNESS

A perfectly silent stone room. Even your footsteps don't echo. The Source, the realm thinks, runs through here in long unbroken lines.

Nothing here can be taken from anyone. The chest gives. The room gives. The walker gives back when they can.

props.open_message: A heaped pile of pebbles, soft-edged and quiet. Thirty of them, by your count. The chest is full again before you turn away.
